title: Youtube Poop: Mario Gets a Letter from Giygas
description:
Watch this in High Quality or else there will be blur. 

You cannot grasp the true form of Giygas's letter! 

To those wondering who Giygas is, he's the final boss of Earthbound. The battle isn't all that great, but it looks freaky and can be seen here: 
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pxvmopvUvnM  

This is my first video made with Adobe Premiere Pro. 

Caution - AIDs. View at your own risk. It's not right, ... not right... It hurts, ... it hurts... I feel... g..o..o..d! Go... b...a...c...k!
